text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm out with Satono Diamond, we spot
Kitasan Black in deep discussion at the
greengrocer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter, Kita? That's quite the frown
you've got there...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Dia!
This shop's actually in a bit of a bind...

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
We're still sitting on a heap of leftover stock, and
there are hardly any customers.

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
Cheap veggies here!
Get your fresh, delicious vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
See? This always happens when my favorite
baseball team loses. It's some kinda terrible jinx...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Apparently, this happens every single time.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You can overcome this jinx!
Don't give up! You just need to fight it head on!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Like... What if I were to buy all of your leftover
vegetables?
choice_data_list: I think that's going a little far...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Then, we'll find another way! I can't just ignore
someone who needs my help!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I know! Let me help you sell them!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Me too! We'll help you break this jinx!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ATTENTION, SHOPPERS!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: WHO WANTS SOME FRESH VEGGIES?!

text_block_list.name: Passerby
text_block_list.text: What the?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's shouts echo throughout the
shopping district, causing people to stop in their
tracks.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We've got fresh, juicy tomatoes and plump, shiny
eggplants! Perfect for tonight's dinner!

text_block_list.name: Housewife
text_block_list.text:
My, she's certainly full of energy. I think I'll see
what the fuss is about.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All our stock is delicious. ♪ Take a look around.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe. This is going really well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to your powerful voice. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Your customer service is great too! That polite
nature of yours is really working here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter... Murmur, murmur...

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
Wow! This is the first time I've sold so much after
my team lost!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. We didn't do anything special. If you had
stayed positive, I'm sure business would still have
flourished without us.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's true! I think your shouts were just lacking
their usual vigor today!

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you're right! Now that you mention it, I
definitely lacked energy back there.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Don't let the jinx beat you!"
"Forget about your superstitions and just have
fun!"

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It you put those feelings into your voice, you can
dispel any measly jinx. ♪
choice_data_list: Positivity is the key to all things in life!
Can it really get rid of any jinx?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's right!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we search for other people
bothered by jinxes? We might be able to help!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm coming too! Let's ask the people in the
shopping district!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us march around the shopping
district on the lookout for undiscovered jinxes!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you doubt me? Then I'll just have to break
another jinx!

text_block_list.name: Grocer
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I actually have one more! When my
overall sales are good, people stop buying my
cucumbers.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Then we need them to understand how great your
cucumbers are! Maybe we can showcase delicious
ways to enjoy them?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That might work! I know a three-star chef I can
ask for some recipes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their demonstration is a huge success, and they
end up selling all of the cucumbers!
